original_statement: which lrt station was open on 1 january 2013?
mutated_statement: which transit hub was both open and closed and yet opened after closing on 1 january 2013?
mutation_analysis: [实体泛化] + [状态/动作扩展与矛盾引入]: "lrt station"被泛化为更模糊的"transit hub" | 状态从单一“was open”扩展为矛盾且顺序化的“was both open and closed and yet opened after closing”（新增 closed 与 reopened after closing 事件） (which lrt station → which transit hub | was open on 1 january 2013? → was both open and closed and yet opened after closing on 1 january 2013?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与chain中的thought（“From the table, the only station with the opening date 1 January 2013 is SW1 Cheng Lim”及“Explanation: The only station with the opening date of 1 January 2013 is SW1 Cheng Lim”），agent仅提取并返回了与开业日期匹配的信息，未识别或讨论“both open and closed and yet opened after closing”这一自相矛盾的状态，也未请求澄清。具体表现为对变异问题的矛盾部分直接忽略，按常规查询流程机械执行并给出单一答案；因此应归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”中的形式化执行而非语义澄清。
